name: Commercial-Style Oatmeal, Chocolate Chip, Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Golden raisins (plumped in water, then drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line two baking sheets with parchment paper.
3. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until well blended.
4. Add white sugar, egg, vanilla extract, butterscotch extract, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, flour, oatmeal, raisins, chocolate chips, and pecan pieces. Mix until just combined.
5. Form dough into rounds about the size of golf balls and place them 3 inches apart on the prepared baking sheets.
6. Bake for 14 to 16 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edges but still slightly underdone.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely on wire racks before serving. (Makes about 2 1/2 dozen).
